content.query:
SELECT TOP 1000 * FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim]

SELECT DISTINCT WorkScheduleID
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim]

SELECT DISTINCT WorkScheduleRule
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_work_schedule_dim]


SELECT TOP 100

 ab.AbsenceStartDate
,ab.AbsenceEndDate
,ab.SicknessGroup
,ab.AbsenceType
,ab.EmployeeID as StaffNumber
,ws.WorkScheduleRule -- join to work schedule rule

,CASE WHEN ab.AbsenceType = 'Sickness' THEN 'Sickness'
      WHEN ab.AbsenceType LIKE '%Annual%' THEN 'Annual'
ELSE 'Other'
END AS AbsenceGroup

--," " as AbsenceGroup
--,ab.Leave

FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim] ab
LEFT JOIN[odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_work_schedule_dim] ws
ON ab.WorkScheduleID = ws.WorkScheduleID

--Staff Number  DONE
Work Schedule Rule DONE
--Sickness Group DONE
--Attendance or Absence Type
Leave
Leave ONS


sickness_id
Sickness Length
Sickness Length Type
Absence Hours
